introSection: Twister III: Storm Chaser is a wooden roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. The ride was based on the original Mr. Twister, which operated at Elitch Gardens before the park was relocated after the 1994 season. The ride was closed for the entirety of the 2022 season for a refurbishment. It reopened in 2023 with a new name and effects in the ride's tunnel.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are build by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Twister III: Storm Chaser on the park's website

fullText:
Twister III: Storm Chaser is a wooden roller coaster located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA. The ride was based on the original Mr. Twister, which operated at Elitch Gardens before the park was relocated after the 1994 season. The ride was closed for the entirety of the 2022 season for a refurbishment. It reopened in 2023 with a new name and effects in the ride's tunnel.



White track and supports.

The trains are build by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.




 * Twister III: Storm Chaser on the park's website
